'''Tempest Scout 1''' was an [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|All Terrain Scout Transport]] in [[Tempest Force/Legends|Tempest Force]]. It was assigned to [[Endor/Legends|Endor]], and it was first to respond to the incident at the [[Endor shield generator bunker|control bunker]]. It was piloted by [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Arnet]] during the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

==Appearances==
*{{Film|VI}} {{1st}}
